svg.title: MDE Quazar wordmark
svg.desc: Stacked lockup approximating the official artwork in assets/brand/MDE-QUAZAR-MAIN.png: "MDE" (white, extra-bold) over "Quazar" (magenta #DA06F7) over "Mackes Display Environment" (brand blue #0850FA, monospace). Proportions (cap heights 165:118:30, widths 625:750:725) are taken from the artwork and enforced with textLength so the lockup holds across font stacks. HONESTY NOTE: these are system-font approximations, not the artwork letterforms (the official "Quazar" is a rounded-square techno face); a designer should replace this with outlined paths traced from the source art. Also requires a font-capable SVG rasterizer (resvg needs a fontdb).
